steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes the Spanish architectural influence across California. The key evidence: architectural tourists 'can easily recognize' how the Santa Fe Depot's style draws from Spanish missions. The correct word must mean something like 'easy to notice' or 'obvious.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'palpable': Means easily perceived or obvious — matches 'can easily recognize.' ✓
  • Choice B — 'understated': Means subtle or restrained — the opposite of something tourists easily recognize. ✗
  • Choice C — 'corroborated': Means confirmed by additional evidence; used for claims or facts, not for a style that exists throughout a region. ✗
  • Choice D — 'disputed': Means contested or debated — contradicts 'can easily recognize.' ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
